title: Walker Chandiok Capital India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Walker Chandiok Capital India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Walker Chandiok Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Amritsar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Walker Chandiok Capital India:
Walker Chandiok Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walker Chandiok Capital India!
